name: Privileged Roles Without PIM Controls
description: Detects privileged role assignments that should be managed with Privileged Identity Management (PIM)
query: SELECT ra.id, ra.principal_id, dr.display_name FROM entra_role_assignments ra JOIN entra_directory_roles dr ON ra.role_definition_id = dr.id WHERE dr.is_enabled = true AND dr.is_built_in = true AND LOWER(dr.display_name) LIKE '%admin%'
remediation: Use Privileged Identity Management to require just-in-time activation, approvals, and time-bound access for privileged roles.
